description: Standard measure categories for normalized numeric values.

entries.label: Length
entries.description: Linear distance, setback, frontage, width, depth, or height measured as a length.

entries.label: Area
entries.description: Lot area, floor area, landscaped area, amenity area, or other area measure.

entries.label: Height
entries.description: Height measured in length units or storeys.

entries.label: Density
entries.description: Units, dwellings, bedrooms, floor area, or other quantities per area or per lot.

entries.label: Count
entries.description: A number of units, bedrooms, spaces, seats, storeys, buildings, signs, lots, or similar count.

entries.label: Ratio
entries.description: A proportional relationship between two quantities.

entries.label: Percentage
entries.description: A percent value such as lot coverage, landscaped area, or bonus allowance.

entries.label: Time
entries.description: A period, duration, deadline, or operating time value.

entries.label: Currency
entries.description: A monetary amount, fee, contribution, or cash-in-lieu amount.

entries.label: Unknown
entries.description: A numeric value whose measure category has not yet been classified.
